arts.ttl: Pau Torres shares injury update as Aston Villa defender closes in on return
arts.sum: Aston Villa defender Pau Torres has posted a video of his recovery as he edges closer to making a long-awaited return to action following the injury he suffered back in December, in the 2-2 draw at home to Brighton and Hove Albion. Pau Torres shares injury update as Aston Villa defender closes in on return

arts.ttl: Player believes he’s had “best match” since Aston Villa exit – Could now see turning point in career
arts.sum: Juventus midfielder Douglas Luiz believes his performance against PSV Eindhoven was the “best match” he he’s had since moving from Aston Villa. Gazzetta dello Sport cover comments from the Brazilian today in which he admits he’s hoping he’s turned a corner at the Italian club. arts.ttl: Deco reveals failed Marcus Rashford move as Barcelona chief makes "not a priority" admission
arts.sum: Barcelona sporting director Deco reveals the club made an effort to sign Marcus Rashford from Manchester United in the winter transfer window.

arts.ttl: Fantasy Premier League: The Liverpool and Aston Villa players to target for Double Gameweek 25 - with Mo Salah's predicted points revealed and a low-owned differential preferred over Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: HOLLY SHAND: A second Double Gameweek in as many weeks is just around the corner in Fantasy Premier League - and if it's as high-scoring as the last, managers are in for another treat.
